interpretation.main_result: The marked-port lift branch terminates as a real family signal without an admission gate.
interpretation.why_this_matters: The sketch-inspired hypothesis was useful because it asked a better reverse question, but the finite test says the tested gate is still too weak.
interpretation.why_not_closure: A persistent source/lift family with one nonselected companion is not a source-native WXYZTI projection-family generator.
interpretation.next_move: Write a Gap A source-shell polarity and lift branch summary, then choose whether to search for a richer admissibility predicate or return to generator derivation.
